videos.title: Ronaldo foi FORÇADO a escolher… e a decisão dele surpreendeu TODO MUNDO 😳🔥
videos.transcript: Em 2023, quando Ronaldo teve que escolher entre seus amigos Messi e Neymar, ele parou para pensar. Messi achou que Ronaldo escolheria Neymar, enquanto Neymar pensou que Ronaldo escolheria Messi em vez dele, mas no final Ronaldo escolheu os dois e Messi ficou muito feliz com a decisão dele. Mas quando chegou a hora de escolher entre Jorginha e Arena, Ronaldo ficou um pouco nervoso. Jorginha também estava muito nervosa. Então Ronaldo a escolheu com confiança e Jorginha ficou muito feliz com a decisão dele. Depois, quando teve que escolher entre sua mãe e sua esposa, Ronaldo escolheu sua mãe e imediatamente pediu desculpa a Jorginha. Jorginha apenas sorriu e disse que ele tinha feito a melhor escolha. Na decisão final, quando teve que escolher entre sua família e a família de Messi, Messi tinha certeza de que Ronaldo escolheria a própria família, mas Ronaldo escolheu as duas e a reação de Messi foi absolutamente inacreditável. Vou te mostrar o vídeo, mas antes, se você é realmente fã do Ronaldo, curta, se inscreva e compartilhe. e comente CR7 Gold se você for um verdadeiro fã dele. Sincronizar com o momento do vídeo

videos.transcript: How long can I stay hidden in my mom 's house without her knowing? For that, I waited for my mom to leave for work and set up. 5 secret hiding spots in her house. Like in the bedroom, the kitchen, and even on the roof. And I did all this to uncover a secret she 's hiding. That I have a brother that I ... Never met. Right now, my mom is n't home. And, as you all know, I do in fact have a brother, Guilherme, who has already recorded. Several videos on the channel. But I started to get really suspicious that I have a third brother. After seeing some photos. Basically, I asked my mom for some old photos to record a video for the channel, but while digging through the oldest photos of all, I noticed something strange. Simply flipping through the pages, they just look like old photos with family and friends. But when we move on to the last pages and think the album is completely finished, if we flip a few more pages ahead, look, we get to kind of a secret section. Some really strange photos that I had never seen before. This photo here, taken at Chr ... Christmas 2006. In the photo, it 's me, my brother, and my mom. I really liked the Ferrari I got for Christmas, but pay close attention. In my mom 's hand, there 's another present, which was n't mine and was n't my brother 's. And if we look closely, there 's a note for 'Roberto.' I do n't have any relatives named Roberto, especially not at an intimate Christmas Eve. But it does n't stop there. There 's also this photo of my mom helping us with our homework, and if you look closely, in her hand, there 's something suspicious. A notebook belonging to Roberto. To make this doubt even stronger—whether or not I have a brother my mom never told me about—I even found this photo of a family picnic we were having. I was already a bit older and I remember this day very well. It was me, my mom, and my brother. But I remember that my mom kept leaving with some food and coming back with nothing. As if she were taking food to someone in secret. And, in the suspicious photo we found in this album, you can see a child. Watching everything from afar in the tree. Is this Roberto? The brother I never knew about that my mom hid for years ... I 'm here. Simba, I need you to stay right here in this spot and wait for me to return, so please do not move until I come back to get you. My love, man, unbelievable. I ca n't believe my mom got home early. Today. She was n't supposed to get here at this time. As you can see, this is our main secret room. But I 'll show it to you guys calmly later. I have to keep a really close eye on my mom. Wow, I ca n't believe I still have a meeting right now. My mom got home early because she has to work and do some meetings. On one hand, that 's a good thing. But on the other hand, it 's a really bad thing. Because when my mom gets into these meetings, she spends hours and hours and hours in front of the computer, working. And I was n't wrong. My mom sat down in front of the computer and did n't leave it for anything. And there was no sign of her giving any hint about my supposed unknown brother. Since my mom ended up getting home earlier, I ended up showing you all the hiding spots. Some of them, in fact, are n't even finished yet. But now it does n't matter anymore. I ca n't get anything else from the secret rooms unless my mom leaves again. But at least in this little room, I have everything I need. There are some things to eat, some toys, some stuff from the channel to pass the time. And here in this room, there 's even an oral hygiene kit, with the channel 's toothbrushes and mouthwash too. Since I figured my mom would sleep in her room, in this secret room I grabbed some pillows and a blanket so I could spend the night and see if I can get some pizza from this guy, Roberto. Wow, guys, I thought my mom 's inertia would never end. Now, since she said she 's going to take a shower, maybe that 's my cue to change hiding spots. If I go down quickly, I can get to the kitchen, which is probably the next place she 'll go. Here, on this lower floor, I picked out two places to make secret hiding spots. One of them is this giant beanbag. I can get inside and watch her through these holes. This box here is a new trash can she bought. Inside it, I made a secret room. Let me get inside here quickly, before my mom gets out of the shower. Believe it or not, this is one of my most spacious secret rooms. Like the others, there are pillows, a blanket, and since this is also the secret kitchen, I left some snacks from the channel here so I can eat while she eats. Actually, in a bit, I think I 'm going to eat some awesome chips. Thanks for the door. Wow, guys, what a scare. It looks like my mom has already gone into the kitchen and really needs to be doing something in order to eat. But it 's a good thing I made this secret hideout, from here I can hear almost everything she says. Definitely, I 'm not able to come to any conclusion. My mom is really just eating, messing around on her phone, not saying anything important. All I can do now is wait. It looks like my mom is getting ready to go upstairs. Since she 's left the kitchen, I think the coast is clear for me to get out. I just have to find a way back to my room. Mainly because if she says anything in her room, during the night, to someone, I need to know. I 've only one chance to do this, when she goes into the bathroom to brush her teeth. Looks like the coast is clear, it seems she went to her room. I wo n't have another chance, I wo n't have another chance to go back and hide trash. Good thing I managed to get back to this place. My mom is already getting things ready to go to bed. Is she going to leave the room? No. She 's just turning off the lights. There 's no point in spying while she 's sleeping, because we wo n't get any information just watching her sleep. All that 's left for me now is to enjoy the rest of my night in my secret room. The worst part is, I 'm not even that sleepy yet and there 's not much for me to do. I think I can kill some time coloring here. The Zé Lomonsters coloring book, there are some packs of markers here, but that 's it, guys. I think for now I 'll just wait until tomorrow, and if there 's any kind of update during the night, I 'll be sure to get back to you. Wow, man. What time is it? It 's six fifty in the morning, man. I forgot that my mom wakes up this early. Let me get up to see what my mom is going to do now. I 'm trying to look through the phone camera here through the little hole, but I ca n't see my mom, man. She just woke up, but there 's no sign of her in the room, man. Oh, wait. Looks like she 's wearing workout clothes, grabbed her headphones ... For sure, my mom woke up early to go to the gym. I ca n't lose sight of my mom. Since I do n't live with my mom anymore, I do n't really remember her routine. But she definitely must eat something before going to the gym. Gui, when you 're having breakfast, let me know because I want to call you, okay? Just to talk, something quick. A My mom is making coffee for herself to drink. Knowing her well, when I used to live here, she always had it on the porch. So I 'd better get into position. I do n't have much time before she comes out to have her coffee. But that 's why, with this couch, we have another strategic room to spy from. My mom. Unfortunately, this is one of the secret rooms I made that 's the most cramped. But it 's really going to be very important. As you can see here, There 's not much comfort. But at least I put a pillow and a blanket here, so if I have to stay here for a long time, I can try to be at least a little comfortable. I even put a little light here, look, so if I have to stay here at night, this place will have at least some basic setup. I was right. My mom really did come to have her coffee here on the porch. And from what I heard, she wanted to call my brother now. Early. It looks like my mom is calling him right now. I 'm going to be quiet to try to listen. Hey, son, how are you? Let me tell you something. I 'm a little worried about your brother. He 's been kind of missing, kind of acting strange for a while now. Yeah, do you think he found out something? Like this. And since she was working out, she did n't say anything else that could help me. Finally, my mom left the gym. But as far as I know her, now she should be leaving the house. I just need to be sure. Now that my mom is n't home anymore, the house is all mine for a while. This is the best moment for me to call her to find out what she wanted to talk to me about back then. Hello? Hey, mom, how are you? Are you okay? Hey there, son, I 'm doing fine. Well, I 'm doing great. It 's just that I 'm calling you. Yeah, I 'm fine too, I 'm calling you because you called me earlier and at the time I was recording and could n't answer. No. Why? Oh, nothing. It 's just, I do n't know. Sometimes you had something to tell me. Alright then. Bye, love. Bye, love. Love you. What do you mean? And since my mom has always loved taking pictures, she always organizes the albums by date. This one here, for example, is from 2003. But from what I can see in the photos, they 're just family pictures and almost all of them are really just me and my brother. But there must be some other clue in these albums that I am missing. I spent all afternoon looking for new clues, but I did n't find anything. Night fell and my mom came back from work. Unfortunately, I had to run back to the secret room. videos.transcript: alguns meses eu gravei um vídeo jogando Azul babão às 3 horas da manhã e eu me arrependi profundamente porém como vocês curtiram muito desse de hoje ser mais ousado hoje nós vamos comprar um boneco do azul babão em um site obscuro da internet antes de mais nada eu queria falar para vocês não repetirem isso em hipótese nenhuma a internet é um lugar muito bom mas temos que tomar muito cuidado com algum sites ou com coisas que a gente não conhece nesse caso eu estou agindo por minha conta e risco e eu recebi o link desse site de um Hater E aparentemente não é uma loja convencional É um site todo meio que mal feito as fontes a barra de pesquisa parece que o site todo foi feito no Paint E por incrível que pareça só tem um produto disponível nesse site que é justamente o boneco de pelúcia do azul babão o boneco como vocês podem ver tá custando 79 reais e é o último disponível não vou mentir pra vocês que eu estava com um pouquinho de medo mas mesmo assim eu decidi comprar esse boneco Já se passou uma semana desde que a gente fez essa compra e o correio acabou de deixar esse pacote aqui para mim nitidamente é um pacote diferente e muito mais suspeito né bem estranho diferente de tudo que eu já vi mas às vezes é uma forma de entregar um produto diferente para o cliente alguma coisa decorativa né não sei chega um momento de a gente abrir se ela se encomenda bem estranha O que que você pediu que ver nesse cacho estranho azulão dando uma olhada nessa caixa e olha isso aqui não abra é bem estranho compra uma coisa é a caixa não abra É melhor nem comprar né Bom pelo que eu tô vendo né é um azulão de pelúcia né normal tem nada de diferente com ele é um jogo bem assustador é um jogo que não tem boas recordações ultima vez que eu joguei mas pelo que eu tô vendo por mais que o site que eu compreenda suspeito parece ser só um boneco normal normalmente pra vocês que talvez eu tenha ficado com um pouco de medo Larissa eu não tô te vendo nada para ver nada na câmera Você apagou a luz Larissa não acho que deve ter caído Eu não apaguei pode ter caído porque tá chovendo Lá Fora nem deu para gravar vídeo ah eu até deixei meu celular cair pera aí não me deixa sozinha no escuro não sem luz caramba Queda de Energia tá parecendo mal contato talvez tenha sido a chuva porque esses últimos dias tem chovido muito e a luz tem caído com frequência somos pedalava que isso ia acontecer de noite Espera aí pronto temos uma luz Melhor agora e como é que faz de bateria tá na metade se realmente não tá me zoando o boneco estava aqui agora ele some do nada claro que não que é onde que eu ia esconder um boneco tava na sua frente na hora que a luz apagou Reinaldo onde a gente tá indo amor ai tenho certeza que é o Nicolas trollagem gente olha aqui o boneco não some do nada e eu não acredito nessas coisas em todo lugares olha ali em cima menos aqui na sua casa gente deu azar ele tá trollando a gente deve ter escondido desse boneco procurando o boneco mesmo Você não acha melhor deixar para lá pelo amor de Deus Larissa o Breno está fazendo gracinha aquele não joga com a nossa cara e eu não vou deixar isso ficar barato [Música] nada aqui também vamos dar uma olhada no meu quarto vamos vamos passa rápido que tá me dando medo de ficar andando nesse escuro a gente precisar de alguma coisa a gente Pelo menos tem ele a bateria tá carregada como que esse bicho dormiu como que alguém pegou só tira nós dois tô te falando é o Breno o Nicolas fazendo alguma gracinha com a gente escondido eu tenho certeza que é um dos meninos Larissa apagou o boneco sumiu uma pessoa não entra tão rápido num lugar assim não tô com medo de verdade o boneco tava na nossa casa a gente comprou Ele tem que estar aqui em algum lugar é possível vem vamos continuar procurando filme de terror talvez pode estar aqui no quarto Gui não tem ninguém aqui também pelo visto nada no quarto aqui também vamos dar uma olhadinha no quarto de jovens pelo visto não tô vendo nada demais não tem nada aqui eu e a Larissa procuramos um boneco pela casa inteira e quando nós estávamos quase desistindo nós decidimos o último lugar que a gente não olhou o quarto da minha mãe é o jeito vamos entrar aí Se tiver vai estar aí nada aqui Sincronizar com o momento do vídeo
